---
title: "Contact"
---

For collaboration or research inquiries, please use the verified profiles below.

- GitHub: <https://github.com/LiTang1013>
- Google Scholar: <https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=3zkQ6d0AAAAJ>
- Email: Coming soon
- ORCID: Coming soon

<!-- TODO: Add verified email, ORCID, and other professional profile links when available. -->
